hero.headline: All your AI in one place
hero.sub: Build and share AI agents connected to your own providers — Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Grok, Ollama and more — each with its own knowledge, memory and tools. Self-host it on your own server and keep full control of your data.

features.multi_agent_body: Create as many specialised agents as you need, each with its own knowledge, connections and memory — no artificial limits.
features.providers_body: Connect Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Grok, Ollama and more with your own API keys. Switch providers without touching a single line of your agents.
features.groups_body: Share agents, knowledge and connections with your team through work groups, without duplicating anything or losing control.
features.selfhosted_body: Your data never leaves your server. Deploy on your own infrastructure with a single command.
features.knowledge_body: Turn documents, URLs and memory into real context for your agents — no retraining, no cloud dependency.
features.skills_body: Give your agents reusable tools: build a skill once and share it across every agent that needs it.
features.dashboard_body: Monitor token and resource consumption, and track the evolution of everything your team builds, in real time.
features.centinel_body: An admin panel with a built-in test suite: verify your instance's health with one click before every deployment.
features.export_body: Export your agents to the native format of Claude Code, GitHub Copilot or OpenAI Assistants in one click. Build once, use them wherever you work.
